label: Margin Utilization
description: Margin utilisation bars with trend and margin-call distance per venue. Highlights venues near limits.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.8.note: Error state: error guard with error.message.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. No fixes required this pass.

1.1.note: Data from useAccountsData() → venueMargins — no inline fetch.

1.3.note: orgVenues memo filters balances → venueMargins derived from filtered set.

1.4.note: No client sub-filter in accounts domain.

1.5.note: No strategy dimension for margin data.

1.7.note: Widget imports nothing from lib/mocks/. Context-level note on ACCOUNTS fixture flagged separately.

l1.notes: Clean data flow. 1.4/1.5 N/A. Context tech debt noted in knownIssues.

l2.notes: Globally satisfied per spec §L2 2026-04-17 update. Commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓, paper ✓ (venue suffix), batch ✓ (T+1 suffix). Margin data derived from balance records which are mode-annotated.

3.2.note: Context reads useExecutionMode() — balances (from which venueMargins derive) are mode-annotated.

3.5.note: Paper mode: margin bars reflect paper balance data with venue label suffix. Correct behavior.

3.6.note: Widget is read-only display. No polling intervals or WebSocket connections.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. 3.3 N/A (no order entry). 3.4 human pending.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks on render path.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8 human pending — widget delegates to MarginUtilization shared component.

5.1.note: Target strategies: none — margin data is account-level, informs risk management across all strategies.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 6 tests covering MarginUtilization card render, venueLabel flow-through, venue-count badge, loading/empty/error branches. See tests/widgets/accounts/accounts-margin-util.test.tsx

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect. No inline deps. Delegates rendering to MarginUtilization component.

8.1.note: No text-[...] arbitrary typography in widget file.

8.3.note: Uses Skeleton from components/ui. Delegates to MarginUtilization shared component.

8.4.note:
Agent: no without alt, no interactive
. Human keyboard walkthrough pending (accessibility of margin bars).

8.5.note: Human resize test at minW=4/minH=3 pending.

mergeCandidate.rationale: Both read from venueMargins/balances in the same context. Balance table already shows a utilization column — margin-util widget provides bar chart visualization. Could merge as a tab or collapsible section in balance table.

relationships.notes: mergeCandidate is a recommendation pending human review.

dataContract.mockSource: lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data (via accounts-data-context; venueMargins derived from balance records)
dataContract.notes: venueMargins derived in context from balance records fetched via useBalances().

coverage.notes: Margin data derived from CeFi balance records only.

knownIssues: accounts-data-context.tsx imports ACCOUNTS and MOCK_SAFTS from lib/mocks/fixtures — org-venue mapping uses mock seed data; should move to lib/constants/ or API-backed reference data (L1 tech debt, context file)

findings.description: accounts-margin-util-widget.tsx — ~2 user-visible strings not wrapped in i18n helpers
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: accounts-data-context.tsx — venueMargins.lastUpdate derived via toLocaleTimeString without timeZone:'UTC', so margin-util bars' lastUpdate displayed viewer-local time
findings.fix: Added timeZone:'UTC' to the toLocaleTimeString call in accounts-data-context.tsx venueMargins memo so margin-util rows render UTC timestamps.

findings.description: components/trading/margin-utilization.tsx (shared component this widget delegates to) still uses text-[10px] and var(--status-error) — flagged to the shared-primitive sweep, not a widget-local finding
findings.note: Shared component owned outside components/widgets/accounts/. File-boundary rule: accounts sweep should not edit components/trading/. Tracked for the shared-sweep queue.
